description_long: This is a modern, low-profile sofa with a sleek, minimalist design, featuring a light gray, tufted upholstery that covers both the seat and backrest. The sofa has three distinct, square back cushions and two cylindrical armrests, all of which are attached and display deep button tufting for added texture. The frame is constructed from black metal tubing, which is visible along the back and sides, giving the piece an industrial yet contemporary aesthetic. The seat is wide and flat, providing ample space for lounging, while the armrests are positioned at the same height as the seat, creating a unified silhouette. The legs are sled-style, formed from continuous metal tubing that loops beneath the sofa for stability. This piece would be well-suited for urban parks, public waiting areas, or modern outdoor lounges.
description: A modern, tufted light gray sofa with cylindrical armrests and a black metal sled base, featuring a minimalist and industrial design.
description_view_0: Side view showing the cylindrical armrest, the depth of the seat, and the sled-style metal frame.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the three square back cushions, two cylindrical armrests, and the wide, tufted seat.
description_view_2: Opposite side view mirroring view 0, showing the other armrest and the continuous metal frame.
description_view_3: Rear view displaying the exposed black metal frame and the back of the three segmented cushions.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Three square, attached back cushions and a single wide, tufted seat cushion; two cylindrical, attached armrest cushions; all cushions are uniform in size and display deep tufting.
attribute_armrest_style: Present, cylindrical, padded armrests at seat height; visually prominent and fully upholstered, matching the seat and backrest in color and tufting.
attribute_leg_design: Sled-style legs made from black metal tubing, forming a continuous loop beneath the sofa; legs are exposed and positioned at the corners and center for support.
attribute_backrest_type: Medium-height, straight, segmented backrest with three attached, square cushions; features deep button tufting for texture.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Solid light gray upholstery with a quilted, tufted pattern on both seat and back cushions; no visible decorative stitching beyond the tufting.
